After finally being able to turn in my motorcycle, an appointment that the manufacturer had to reach out to me directly because this team was nowhere to be found. (Here is what the manufacturer said "after trying several times to get in touch with your attorneys, we decided to try and reach out directly"). After all this, they still collected their money, and informed me that they did their job. On paper, the job was done, but not without 6 extra months of stress and money lost on my part. In hindsight, I should've just kept the bike, since it was less of a headache than this nightmare.

The only reason they get 2 stars is there was one individual that stepped in in the last week of this running joke, that actually did help.

Hello, my name is Flor, and I'm writing this review with tears of joy.

I arrived in this country eight months ago and immediately began searching for asylum lawyers. I found attorney Gabriel through Google, and my experience has been excellent.

The first thing I did was schedule a video call with them. After explaining my case, they explained the procedure. A few days later, I went to their office, where they took my statement and instructed me on what documents to bring for my court hearings. I had a total of three court hearings, all of which were attended by attorney Gabriel.

Two days ago was my last hearing. My future and that of my children was going to be decided by the judge, who was also present at the hearing via video call.

I was nervous, along with my husband. The lawyer, the prosecutor, the translator, and the judge were all present. My appointment started at 8:30 in the morning, and at noon, the judge granted me asylum.

I feel that this wouldn't have been possible without the help of lawyer Gabriel and his entire team. They answered all my calls because I had questions, and they gave me a fair price for their services. I highly recommend them because nowadays there are many lawyers out there trying to make money without helping. Lawyer Gabriel was honest from the beginning, and I followed all his suggestions to the letter. This was the result: my husband, my three children, and I now have asylum!

You have no idea how wonderful it feels to know you found support from honest people and that all the time and money were well spent.

If anyone seeking asylum needs a good lawyer, I recommend contacting lawyer Gabriel. Keep your spirits up; this is difficult, but not impossible.

Blessings to all,
Flor Mendoza

There are moments in life when legal expertise alone isn’t enough — you also need compassion, clarity, and true dedication.

His legal precision, depth of knowledge, and strategic understanding of the case were simply impeccable. From the very first conversation, Aaron treated our family not just as clients, but as people going through an incredibly difficult chapter. His professionalism came with warmth, and his confidence brought us peace in moments of great uncertainty.

We will always be profoundly grateful.

I am incredibly grateful to Mr. Shnider and Jennifer for their outstanding representation and support during one of the most stressful times in my life.

Last year, after being injured in a traffic accident, I completely lost my temper with the police and overreacted—leading to a serious legal situation. Mr. Shnider quickly clarified the legal landscape and presented me with clear, realistic options that allowed me to begin putting my life back in order.

Mr. Shnider is exceptionally honest and diligent in his work, and Jennifer guided me through each step of the process with care and compassion. At one point, I even missed a court appearance—but incredibly, Mr. Shnider was able to recover the situation as if nothing had happened.

I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Shnider and his team without reservation. Their professionalism, dedication, and humanity truly made all the difference.
